Clean legal article records - audit data.interpretation: All cleaned legal records are retained for auditability, including legal variants such as repeated articles.

Unique numeric legal articles.interpretation: Represents the official numeric sequence of Saudi Labor Law articles.

Legal repeated numeric labels kept as va.interpretation: Repeated numeric labels are preserved because legal labels such as 'مكرر' represent valid legal variants, not duplicate rows.

Active legal articles allowed for RAG.interpretation: Only active legal articles are allowed inside the RAG indexing knowledge base.

Repealed legal articles archived only.interpretation: Repealed legal articles are retained for transparency but excluded from retrieval indexing.

Repealed articles inside experimental KB.interpretation: Must be zero to prevent retrieval from repealed legal provisions.

Clean FAQ records.interpretation: FAQ records after cleaning and duplicate removal.

FAQ indexing records.interpretation: FAQ records included in the experimental knowledge base.

FAQ evaluation records held out.interpretation: FAQ records reserved for evaluation and excluded from the experimental KB.

FAQ leakage between indexing and evaluat.interpretation: Must be zero to avoid inflated retrieval scores.

FAQ evaluation records leaked into exper.interpretation: Must be zero because evaluation questions should not appear in the experimental retrieval base.

Experimental KB records.interpretation: Experimental KB contains active legal articles and FAQ indexing records only.

Full production KB records.interpretation: Production KB contains active legal articles and all clean FAQ records after evaluation.

Structural chunks.interpretation: Chunks generated using the safe structural chunking strategy.

Fixed-size chunks.interpretation: Chunks generated using the fixed-size baseline strategy.

Repealed legal chunks - structural.interpretation: Must be zero to ensure repealed legal articles were not chunked for retrieval.

Repealed legal chunks - fixed-size.interpretation: Must be zero to ensure repealed legal articles were not chunked in the baseline.

Total evaluation questions.interpretation: Unified evaluation dataset including FAQ, legal article questions, and out-of-scope tests.

FAQ evaluation questions.interpretation: Held-out FAQ questions used for retrieval evaluation.

Legal article evaluation questions.interpretation: Manual legal questions linked to gold legal article references.

Out-of-scope evaluation questions.interpretation: Questions used to test refusal behavior outside Saudi Labor Law.

Unique legal chapters.interpretation: Number of unique legal chapters represented in the cleaned legal dataset.

Unique FAQ sectors.interpretation: Number of unique FAQ sectors represented after cleaning.

Unique FAQ subsites.interpretation: Number of unique FAQ subsites represented after cleaning.
